description_long: This delivery robot features a robust, boxy chassis with a flat, rectangular roof topped by a blue solar panel, likely for power generation. The vehicle is supported by four large, black wheels, providing stability and traction for urban navigation. On one side, a blue box with a cable attached is mounted, possibly housing electronics or sensors, while the opposite side has a compartment with orange-banded cargo, suggesting storage for deliveries. The frame is reinforced with black rails and bars, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for outdoor environments. The interior is partially visible, showing a divided space that could accommodate packages or equipment. The overall design emphasizes durability, functionality, and autonomous operation in city settings.
description: A rugged, boxy delivery robot with a blue solar panel, large black wheels, and side-mounted cargo and electronics compartments. Its reinforced frame and visible storage area suggest it is built for autonomous urban deliveries.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat face with the blue solar panel on top and the blue electronics box on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the blue solar panel, the open interior, and the orange-banded cargo compartment at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cargo compartment and the symmetrical wheel arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the blue electronics box with a cable and the open frame structure, as well as the cargo compartment on the opposite side.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Four large, solid wheels, likely drive wheels, arranged at each corner of the chassis for stability and traction.
attribute_compartment_access_panel: A visible access panel is present on the left side at the rear, marked by orange bands, likely serving as the cargo compartment door.
